zh.lifeSummary: 當John Fitzthomas FITZGERALD 1st Earl of Kildare於1250年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 吉爾達阿時，他的父親Thomas Fitz Maurice34歲，母親Rohese St Michael17歲。他於1275年與Blanche de la Roche在愛爾蘭庫迪 斯利格巴納達結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1316年9月10日在愛爾蘭庫迪 吉爾達梅諾斯享年66歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭庫迪 吉爾達吉爾達。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Fitzthomas FITZGERALD 1st Earl of Kildare于1250年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 吉爾達阿时，他的父亲Thomas Fitz Maurice34岁，母亲Rohese St Michael17岁。他于1275年与Blanche de la Roche在爱尔兰庫迪 斯利格巴納達结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1316年9月10日在爱尔兰庫迪 吉爾達梅諾斯享年66岁，埋葬在爱尔兰庫迪 吉爾達吉爾達。

nameMeanings.name: FITZGERALD
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Eamon, Liam, Aidan, Bridgid, Caitlin, Donal, Fitz, Fitzgerald, Ciaran, Colum, Dermot.

Irish: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Gerald (see Gerald ), ‘son of Gerald’. This is a very common Anglo-Norman name in Ireland, where it has been Gaelicized as Mac Gearailt. Irish bearers of the name claim descent from Gerald Fitzwalter de Windsor, constable of Pembroke Castle in the early 12th century, whose grandson Raymond (or Redmond) ‘le Gros’ FitzGerald (died after 1185) led the invasion of Ireland on behalf of Strongbow in 1170. A branch of the family held the title Knight of Glin from at least 1299–2011.

variants.name: Jarrell
meanings: English (Kent and Middlesex; of Norman origin): variant of Jarrold, itself a variant of Gerald .

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When John Fitzthomas FITZGERALD 1st Earl of Kildare was born in 1250, in Athy, County Kildare, Ireland, his father, Thomas Fitz Maurice, was 34 and his mother, Rohese St Michael, was 17. He married Blanche de la Roche in 1275, in Banada, County Sligo, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 10 September 1316, in Maynooth, County Kildare, Ireland, at the age of 66, and was buried in Kildare, County Kildare, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Fitzthomas FITZGERALD 1st Earl of Kildare est né en 1250, à Athy, County Kildare, Irlande, son père, Thomas Fitz Maurice, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Rohese St Michael, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Blanche de la Roche en 1275, à Banada, County Sligo, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 10 septembre 1316, à Maynooth, County Kildare, Irlande, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à Kildare, County Kildare, Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Fitzthomas FITZGERALD 1st Earl of Kildare 1250 in Athy, County Kildare, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Fitz Maurice 34 und seine Mutter Rohese St Michael 17. Er hat 1275 in Banada, County Sligo, Irland Blanche de la Roche geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 10. September 1316 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Maynooth, County Kildare, Irland und wurde in Kildare, County Kildare, Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Fitzthomas FITZGERALD 1st Earl of Kildare è nato il nel 1250 nel Athy, County Kildare, Irlanda, il suo padre, Thomas Fitz Maurice, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Rohese St Michael, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Blanche de la Roche nel 1275, nel Banada, County Sligo, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 10 settembre 1316, nel Maynooth, County Kildare, Irlanda, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolto a Kildare, County Kildare, Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: John Fitzthomas FITZGERALD 1st Earl of Kildareが1250年にアイルランドコウントイ キルダアアシーで生まれた時，父Thomas Fitz Mauriceは34歳，母Rohese St Michaelは17歳であった。1275年にアイルランドコウントイ スリゴバナダでBlanche de la Rocheと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1316年9月10日にアイルランドコウントイ キルダアメイノオスで66歳で死去し，アイルランドコウントイ キルダアキルダアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Fitzthomas FITZGERALD 1st Earl of Kildare(이)가 1250년 아일랜드 카운티 킬더르 앳히에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Fitz Maurice(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Rohese St Michael(은)는 17세였다. 그는 1275년 아일랜드 카운티 슬리고 바나다에서 Blanche de la Roche(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1316년 9월 10일 아일랜드 카운티 킬더르 메이노스에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드 카운티 킬더르 킬더르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Fitzthomas FITZGERALD 1st Earl of Kildare nasceu em 1250, em Athy, County Kildare, Irlanda, seu pai, Thomas Fitz Maurice, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Rohese St Michael, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Blanche de la Roche em 1275, em Banada, County Sligo, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 10 de setembro de 1316, em Maynooth, County Kildare, Irlanda, com 66 anos, e foi sepultado em Kildare, County Kildare, Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Fitzthomas FITZGERALD 1st Earl of Kildare родился в 1250 г. в местности ати, коунти каилдар, Ирландия, его отцу по имени Thomas Fitz Maurice было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Rohese St Michael, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Blanche de la Roche в 1275 г. в местности банада, коунти слиго, Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 10 сентября 1316 г. в местности меинут, коунти каилдар, Ирландия в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности каилдар, коунти каилдар, Ирландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Fitzthomas FITZGERALD 1st Earl of Kildare nació en 1250, en Athy, County Kildare, Irlanda, su papá, Thomas Fitz Maurice, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Rohese St Michael, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Blanche de la Roche en 1275, en Banada, County Sligo, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 10 de septiembre de 1316, en Maynooth, County Kildare, Irlanda, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultado en Kildare, County Kildare, Irlanda.
